src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Authe.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID to comply with stricter serialization checks in modern Java versions.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Authe.why_exists: Java 14+ introduced @Serial for serialization fields; while not strictly a compile error in all setups, it is a required modernization for clean builds with strict linting or future JDK versions enforcing serialization safety.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.general_idea: Replace manual cast after instanceof check with pattern matching for instanceof to utilize Java 16+ feature.
